case_title: HEATH NEWTON LLP VS. RAYMOND LI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEATH NEWTON LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, RAYMOND $2,460.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$90.00) SERVED SEP-04-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, RAYMOND

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY TERRANCE HEATH---MANAGING PARTNER . NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: MARJORIE MANZELLA. NOT REPORTED. (DEPT.506).
